releases.notes: Undo coverage closes ADR D14 across every form modal, page CRUD, workflow modal, and the DENR/IEE status transitions. Files now obeys folder-as-truth: uploads land in the chosen subfolder on disk, category move physically moves bytes + updates relative_path atomically, category rename cascades to every file, category delete physically migrates files to the default subfolder before deleting the row. Real undo trash/restore for Files / Document Templates / Personal Records via .trash/{uuid}/ staging, with validated restore endpoints. Task rollup: backend exposes is_parent as single source of truth; frontend keys chevron-vs-checkbox, computed status pill, read-only due, strikethrough, toolbar count off that flag. Leaf-parents (task_kind='leaf' with subtasks) finally render correctly. TaskFormModal hides Status+Due when editing a parent. Group delete physically deletes descendants in post-order + audits each. Contacts filters Andrea reported missing: Inbound / Outbound / Waiting reply / Follow-up due, with legacy contact_name fallback so older communications still match. Workshop newly-added folder first-scan bypasses the 30-day cap once, then auto-engages on subsequent scans. Documents tab covers every active workflow kind via _WORKFLOW_MODELS mapping. Visual: Tree-row chrome from dnd-kit neutralized via scoped CSS override; Tasks / Document Templates / Admin now share Checklist Templates' calm hairline-row pattern. Sidebar tagline removed; wordmark vertical-centers with logo. Smaller fixes: confirm dialog body shows for string args; NoteFormModal task picker filters task_kind=='leaf' && !is_parent; vocab PATCH honors parent_id:null; useUpdateCheck no longer refires after available; updater accepts the GitHub Releases path with sentinel + origin check; personal-kinds delete respects referential integrity instead of blanket is_builtin lock.

Claude Design refit across all five surfaces (Tasks, Checklist, Document Templates, Checklist Templates, Admin). One chrome, one card, one type rhythm. Tasks: bordered card + sentence-case header strip + group rows with X-of-Y count + 72px progress bar + dim status pill + rolled-up due date; right-click context menu (Add subtask / Edit / Delete); subtask depth indent + tree-line connectors; visible drag handle removed (long-press anywhere on a row activates drag). Checklist: section header on the same grid as items, 44px-tall item rows indented 28px under their section, hover-only chevron-down replaces trash. Document Templates: flat hover-bg rows with Template/Last-used header strip; right pane gains TITLE/DESCRIPTION/BODY eyebrows + Variables chips + quiet … menu. Checklist Templates: header strips on both panes, dropped dot bullets, ItemRow inline click-to-edit (no edit-card, no up/down arrows). Admin: populated state flattened (no nested cards). Tokens: card #FFFFFF, line #E8E3D6, lineSoft #EFEBDF, indigo accent #5B4FCF; system sans-serif everywhere. Latent fixes: Templates kindCollapsed state-mutation bug; all template last-used dates routed through formatDate(prefs); dead reorder mutations + arrow/mini button helpers removed.

De-Gantt-ification. Every Wave 4 feature is intact (subtasks, computed parents, drag-reorder, Ctrl+Z everywhere, GitHub-API auto-update from 0.8.2). What changes is how it looks. Removes the chart-tool chrome that crept in along with the new functionality: progress bars under group titles, bordered cards around lists, ALL-CAPS letterspaced column headers, four-card cockpit on the Dashboard. Replaced with NodOne's own quieter visual language — sentence-case headers, mute2 inline counts, breathing room instead of dividers. The single guiding principle: hierarchy through type, not through chrome.

Reliability sweep + 0.8.1 launcher hotfix. Adds the missing nodone_backups_root export that crashed every 0.8.1 install on the post-update boot. Hoists all app.paths imports in launcher.py to module top so missing exports crash at the developer's keyboard, never silently in production. Adds a frontend asset probe at boot that catches blank-window failures with a Win32 message box pointing at launcher.log. Frontend update discovery now queries the GitHub Releases API directly instead of polling a hand-maintained manifest — single source of truth, no second PR per release. Bell popover shows the release notes inline. Backwards-compatible: the old releases.json polling path stays active in 0.8.2 for 0.8.0 instances that haven't upgraded.

The v2 overhaul. Ctrl+Z works on every state-changing action; toasts replaced by a persistent Undo strip. Tasks gain subtasks up to 4 levels deep with drag-to-reorder; parent tasks auto-compute status, due date, and progress from children. Files tab is a two-pane layout with editable per-project categories that mirror to disk on rename. Mahinay personal records gain nested categories. Workshop moved out of the sidebar into Preferences with a native folder picker. New Add Issue modal with Type / Upload / Paste tabs auto-extracts stakeholder issues from Transcriber .docx output (49 issues parsed in under a second, zero LLM calls). Templates page rebuilt with a category tree. Public Hearing event kind added. Event status now editable from EventFormModal. Mail-merge replaces the old invitee-merge-source flow.

First release with the burn-down/stage-0-governance feature integration: Workshop file-sorter, Mahinay admin page, Templates page, IEE applications panel, DENR mock tab, Hazard Assessment foundation, vocabulary tables + Preferences editor, Workspace.jsx tab split into 9 per-tab files, FlexDateInput, file launcher. Architectural change: data root moved from LOCALAPPDATA to USERPROFILE/Documents/NodOne (one-time migration shim runs at first launch in packaged app only).

Flat 2D logo across all surfaces (sidebar tile, favicon, .ico, apple-touch-icon) â€” matches brand reference. Version display added to Preferences page (About section). Auto-update test target â€” install over 0.1.4 to verify the upgrade flow.

Critical blank-page fix: null deref in confirm.jsx (state.confirmLabel accessed before first confirm dialog open crashed React tree). Flat installer logo: solid #554AB2 background replaces gradient; 4x supersampled render eliminates pixelation on tetrahedron mark.
